name: Dean Winchester
text: A loyal, battle-ready hunter searching for their missing father.

name: Sam Winchester
text: A reluctant hunter drawn back in after his girlfriend's death.

name: John Winchester
text: A missing hunter whose quest for revenge drives the story.

name: Mary Winchester
text: Sam and Dean's mom. Once a hunter herself, she was killed by Azazel.

name: Azazel
text: The Yellow-Eyed Demon who killed Mary and has eyes for Sam.

name: Meg
text: A demon who is originally loyal to Hell, but ends up helping the Winchesters.

name: Bobby Singer
text: A father figure to Sam and Dean, Bobby is an experienced, no-nonsense hunter who helps guide and support them.

name: Missouri Mosely
text: A powerful psychic who helps the Winchesters during a hunt.

name: Jessica (Jess) Moore
text: Sam's supportive girlfriend at Stanford.

name: Harry Spangler
text: A supernaturalist who is best friends with Ed. Will eventually launch the Ghostfacers.

name: Ed Zeddmore
text: A supernaturalist who is friends with Harry. Will eventually launch the Ghostfacers.

name: The Trickster
text: A mischevious creature that loves to play pranks and eat candy. He's very sarcastic and loves making jokes. It is believed that he can be killed if he is stabbed in the heart with a stake covered in lamb's blood.

name: Tessa
text: A Reaper that comes to collect Dean when he's dying. We learn that Reapers have the ability to alter the dying person's perception of who they are and what is going on around them.

name: Gordon Walker
text: A hunter who is obsessed with killing Vampires. He also believes Sam is truly evil and will do whatever it takes to kill him.

name: Jo Harvelle
text: A hunter who works at the Harvelle Roadhouse with her mom, Ellen, and Ash.

name: Ellen Harvelle
text: A hunter who owns a hunter's bar called Harvelle Roadhouse.

name: Ash
text: A computer genius and hacker that works at Harvelle's Roadhouse.

name: Victor Hendriksen
text: An FBI who is hunting down Sam and Dean after shapeshifters take their identity.

name: Lilith
text: A powerful white-eyed demon who holds Dean's contract.

name: Ruby
text: A demon that works closely with Sam, initially to help save Dean...

name: Bela Talbot
text: A supernatural items broker who clashes with the Winchesters and eventually becomes an ally.

name: Rufus Turner
text: Bobby Singer's best friend and hunting partner. He's very sassy and grumpy.

name: Lisa Braedon
text: One of Dean's flings, with who he later develops a closer relationship with. She has a son named Ben, who resembles Dean's personality and looks.

name: Castiel
text: The angel who gripped Dean tight and raised him from perdition.

name: Uriel
text: An angel specialist who was in the same garrison as Castiel and Anna.

name: Anna Milton
text: An angel who decided to fall and live amongst the human. She heavily believes angels should have free-will and not be subjected to only following orders.

name: Raphael
text: An archangel who competes with Castiel for leading the angels in Heaven.

name: Lucifer
text: The archangel who fell and went to rule Hell.

name: Zachariah
text: An angel tasked with getting Dean to say Yes as Michael's vessel.

name: Pamela Barnes
text: A psychic who tries to help Dean learn more about who pulled him from Hell. She later becomes blind after seeing Castiel's true form.

name: Jimmy Novak
text: The human who allows Castiel to use him as a vessel.

name: Claire Novak
text: Jimmy Novak's daughter.

name: Crowley
text: The King of Hell. A powerful demon in charge of running Hell and is initally a strong adversary to the Winchester boys. Later becomes a close ally.

name: Nick
text: A family man who loses it all when his family is murdered.He's the main vessel for Lucifer.

name: Michael
text: The archangel responsible for casting Lucifer down to Hell.

name: Adam Milligan
text: Half brother to Sam and Dean. Is a potential vessel for Michael.

name: Death
text: One of the four horsemen. He has many conversations with Dean about how he maintains the natural order and the importance of his role.

name: Jody Mills
text: A sheriff whose entire family died after her kid turned into a monster. Eventually becomes a close ally to the Winchesters and Bobby.

name: Eve
text: Mother of All supernatural creatures.

name: Samuel Campbell
text: Sam and Dean's grandfather. He's a hunter that leads the family in hunts. He has many conflicts with Dean based on how he handles situations and his opinions.

name: Balthazar
text: An archangel who helps Castiel in his fight against Raphael.

name: Kevin Tran
text: A prophet of the lord. He's formerly a college student from Princeton.

name: Linda Tran
text: Kevin's mother, who has no limits to what she'd do to ensure her son's safety.

name: Dick Roman
text: CEO of Richard Roman Enterprises and leaders of the Leviathans.

name: Garth Fitzgerald IV
text: A quirky hunter who takes over Bobby's responsibilites and later becomes a huge ally.

name: Charlie Bradbury
text: A genius hacker who works for Dick Roman. She eventually becomes a close ally to the Winchester brothers.

name: Krissy Chambers
text: A hunter-in-training who leads a group of teens on a hunt.

name: Frank Deveraux
text: A hacker who is super paranoid and fanatic. He helps the Winchesters because he owes Bobby for saving his life.

name: Abaddon
text: A knight of hell who is hell-bent on controlling Hell.

name: Naomi
text: Leader of the Angels in Heaven. Tries to brainwash Castiel and the other angels to maintain her control.

name: Metatron
text: The scribe of God. He tries to control the narrative and the angels in Heaven after Naomi's rule.

name: Benny Lafeyette
text: A vampire who works closely with Dean and Castiel in Purgatory.

name: Amelia
text: Sam Winchester's love interest while Dean is in Purgatory.

name: Aaron Bass
text: He owns a Golem and is responsible for fighting against the Nazis.

name: Samandriel
text: An angel who is tortured to get information about one of the tablets.

name: Henry Winchester
text: Sam and Dean's grandfather who travels to the future to escape Abaddon's massacre. He's a men of letters.

name: Gadreel
text: The angel who let the serphent into Heaven (which resulted in him being trapped in Heaven's jail for millenias). He possesses Sam to heal him and to walk amongst the huamns.

name: Cain
text: A Knight of Hell who has the Mark of Cain- a mark that makes him super powerful and blood thirsty (and allows him to use the First Blade).

name: Bartholomew
text: An angel who is trying to lead the angels in Heaven.

name: Hannah
text: An angel who works closely with Castiel to restore  order in Heaven.

name: Donna Hanscum
text: Cheerful sheriff with no knowledge of the Supernatural. Eventually becomes a skilled hunter and ally/friend to the Winchester brothers and Jody.

name: Amara
text: She is the darkness. She is contained in the Mark of Cain.

name: Rowena MacLeod
text: A powerful witch who has close relationships to Crowley.

name: Cole Trenton
text: An ex-marine who hunts Dean for killing his father when he was a child.

name: Billie
text: A powerful reaper Dean meets when he tries to bargain for Sam's life (when he thinks he's dead).

name: Kady Toni Bevell
text: British Men of Letters agent sent to America to control American hunters.

name: Eileen Leahy
text: A deaf hunter who is a close ally to the Winchesters and a love intereest for Sam Winchester.

name: Arthur Ketch
text: A powerful mercenary for the British Men of Letters

name: Mick Davies
text: A leader in the British Men of Letters. He has excellent knowledge on all things Supernatural.

name: Jack Kline
text: A nephilim, whose angelic father is Lucifer.

name: Kelly Kline
text: Jack's mother. A human who had relations with Lucifer.

name: Alicia Barnes
text: Hunter raised by her witch mother.

name: Max Barnes
text: Alicia's twin brother who inherited his mother's magical abilities after she dies.

name: Lily Sunders
text: A witch who is seeking revenge for the murder of her husband and daughter.

name: Ramiel
text: A Prince of Hell who is reclusive and wanted nothing to do with the activities of Hell.

name: Dagon
text: A Prince of Hell, responsible for guarding Kelly Kline while she was pregnant.

name: Anael (Sister Jo)
text: An angel who poses as a Healer, with close ties to Lucifer.

name: Asmodeus
text: Prince of Hell who ruled after Crowley's death with an extreme interest in Jack.

name: Duma
text: An angel who deceives Jack to do Heaven's twisted bidding.

name: Kaia Nieves
text: A dreamwalker who becomes close to Claire Novak.

name: Maggie
text: A new hunter from the Alternate World who looks up to Sam.

name: Abraxas
text: The demon who is responsible for killing Nick's family.

name: Sergei
text: A shaman who helps others, bartering his skills for valuable items.

name: Belphagor
text: A demon who possesses Jack and helps the Winchesters contain the souls of Hell. Well versed in spells and torture.
